title: tragia cannabina var. hastata
intro: Tragia cannabina var. hastata, also known as the lesser nettle, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, characterized by its small, nettle-like leaves and slender stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Tragia cannabina var. hastata include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
